expectedTexts: The session walks through a realistic flow with representative token counts.
Each turn appends new messages, tool results, and assistant output to the context window.
When usage crosses the threshold, compaction summarizes the oldest conversation state.
Unchanged; not part of message history
Re-injected, capped at 5,000 tokens per skill and 25,000 tokens total; oldest dropped first
